query: SELECT id, name, element, tier, slot, level_req, hp_bonus, atk_bonus, def_bonus, spd_bonus, shop_price, npc_sell_price FROM equipment_templates WHERE is_active = 1 ORDER BY level_req DESC LIMIT 15
